text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I need to ask Narita Taishin<n>something, so I go
looking for her on<n>the rooftop. I don't see her right
away, but then I hear a voice...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, another ad? I've hardly been<n>able to
progress the story because of<n>these damn ads...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh, what's this one? "Real results in<n>just three
days!" "Get rid of old, dead<n>skin cells!" "Reveal a
fresher, brighter<n>you!"

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list:
Don't even think about buying shady products
like that!

Don't even think about buying shady products
like that!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Don't scare me like that. I'm<n>not gullible
enough to believe<n>something so stupid, anyway!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
So she says, but it seems like she's<n>worried
about her skin.
